description: Live virtual R2RML/Iceberg graph source over the Snowflake-managed ENTERPRISE_DEMO warehouse at SF20 scale (harness-owned 'enterprise-sf20-v' source, registered 2026-07-14 to replace the retired horizon-demo 'enterprise' source whose stored client_secret had gone stale). EXPENSIVE + rate-limited (live Snowflake REST catalog + Parquet reads) — pace queries and avoid full-corpus sweeps against it. NOTE: SF20 data volume differs from native-sf01, so result hashes will NOT match native-sf01; hash comparison is only meaningful against a scale-matched virtual target (see virtual-sf01).
